faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Paramus home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere clothing, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes or cases on fabrics, and adult moths flying around closets or storage areas. You may also notice larvae (small cream-colored worms) on clothing or damage to carpets, upholstery, and other natural fiber materials. Our Paramus technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control service include in Paramus?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a detailed inspection of closets, storage areas, and affected spaces, identification of moth species and infestation extent, targeted treatment using safe and effective methods, removal of larvae and eggs, preventive recommendations for fabric storage, and follow-up visits as needed. We customize our approach based on the severity of your infestation and the size of your Paramus property.

faqs.question: Why is there such a price range ($550-$5,000) for clothes moth control?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on the severity of infestation, the size of the affected area, the number of treatment visits required, and whether preventive measures are needed. A single closet with minor moth activity may cost around $550, while extensive infestations affecting multiple rooms, valuable collections, or commercial spaces in Paramus can require comprehensive treatment programs reaching $5,000. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing.
